items.title: Brandin Podziemski has gone home to St. John’s Northwestern Military Academy every year for graduation. This year was extra special
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Brandin Podziemski has gone home to St. John’s Northwestern Military Academy every year for graduation. This year was extra special 

Five years after his own graduation, he gave a powerful keynote address: “It only makes sense to give back.” www.nbcsportsbayarea.com/nba/golden-s...

items.title: Brandin Podziemski sends powerful message in graduation speech at his alma mater
items.author: NBC Sports Bay Area & California
items.body_excerpt: Brandin Podziemski sends powerful message in graduation speech at his alma mater NBC Sports Bay Area & California
